• Interactive Magic 8 Ball with 3D WebGL particle effects and shake animations
  • Supports 5 response styles: friendly, mean, silly, dramatic, roast
  • Fetches AI-generated answers via OpenRouter using the Gemma 3n model
    const MODEL = "google/gemma-3n-e2b-it:free";
    magicBall.classList.add('is-shaking');

This web application recreates a Magic 8 Ball with interactive 3D visuals and dynamic animations. Users input questions, choose a response tone, and receive brief AI-generated answers inside the ball. It leverages Three.js for particle effects, Tailwind CSS for layout, and OpenRouter for AI inference.
